meaning: 莫罗尼[非洲岛国科摩罗首都]
examples: He later gave them back to the Angel Moroni, he said.
The girl was taken to a hospital in capital of the Comoros, Moroni.
Reports say the plane had been due in Moroni at about 0230 (2330GMT on Monday).
Is there a thread, dark or golden, that runs from Moroni to Mitt?
The Combating Terrorism Center at West Point military academy in New York has obtained a passport of Fazul Abdullah Mohammed issued in 1990 in Moroni and renewed in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, in 1996.
